title: I.. am steve
description: When someone says I am steve in the chat, you get to hear it :)
body:
I.. am steve

As a child I yearned for the mines, but something always got in the way.
But the call of the mines was too strong, so one day, I started digging, and digging.. until I found.. this

--------------------------------------------
This mod makes it so that when someone says "i am steve" in the chat, the original crisp sound from jack black plays right in your ears
